agent_summary: Customer reports: "I tried to pay 1500 taka to a merchant but the payment failed and my balance was deducted." Classified as payment_failed. Evidence cross-checked against Transaction TXN-2001.
recommended_next_action: Trace the matched transaction through the payments ledger, confirm the deduction status, and if eligible route for an official-channel resolution.
customer_reply: Thank you for reporting the payment issue (reference TXN-2001). We have noted the failed transaction and our payments team will verify the deduction status. Any eligible amount will be processed through our official in-app support channel or hotline.
